title: Understanding Artificial Intelligence: A Basic Introduction

questions.sentence: Artificial Intelligence is a fascinating field that is changing our world rapidly.
Simply put, AI refers to machines or computer systems that can think and learn like humans.
You probably use AI every day without even realizing it.
At its core, AI uses algorithms, which are like step-by-step instructions.
These algorithms allow computers to analyze large amounts of information and find patterns.
AI has a huge impact on many areas, from healthcare to transportation.
